center.name: Wooroloo, Western Australia
center.summary: Wooroloo, Western Australia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白胸鸲鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the main southern part of its range, it is found in an area bounded by Jarrahdale and Woorooloo on or east of the Darling Scarp, and south-east to Beaufort Inlet

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the main southern part of its range, it is found in an area bounded by Jarrahdale and Woorooloo on or east of the Darling Scarp, and south-east to Beaufort Inlet
